gbt7714.name: GB/T 7714-2015
gbt7714.description: 中国国家标准 GB/T 7714-2015 文后参考文献著录规则

templates.journal_article: [序号] 作者1, 作者2, 作者3. 题名[J]. 刊名, 年, 卷(期): 起止页码.
templates.journal_article_example: [1] 张三, 李四, 王五. 基于优化方法的资源配置研究[J]. 系统工程学报, 2020, 35(3): 321-335.
templates.book: [序号] 作者. 书名[M]. 版次. 出版地: 出版者, 出版年: 起止页码.
templates.book_example: [2] 李明. 数学建模方法与应用[M]. 第2版. 北京: 高等教育出版社, 2019: 45-67.
templates.book_series: [序号] 作者. 书名[M]//主编. 系列丛书名. 卷. 版次. 出版地: 出版者, 出版年: 起止页码.
templates.conference: [序号] 作者. 题名[C]//会议名称. 会议地点, 会议日期. 出版地: 出版者, 出版年: 起止页码.
templates.conference_example: [3] 张华. 智能优化算法在路径规划中的应用[C]//中国系统工程学会. 系统工程年会论文集. 上海, 2020-10-15. 北京: 科学出版社, 2020: 123-130.
templates.thesis: [序号] 作者. 题名[D]. 保存地点: 保存单位, 年份.
templates.thesis_example: [4] 王强. 机器学习在时间序列预测中的应用研究[D]. 北京: 清华大学, 2021.
templates.patent: [序号] 专利申请者. 专利题名: 专利国别, 专利号[P]. 公告日期.
templates.standard: [序号] 主要责任者. 标准编号 标准名称[S]. 出版地: 出版者, 出版年.
templates.standard_example: [6] 中国国家标准管理委员会. GB/T 7714-2015 信息与文献 参考文献著录规则[S]. 北京: 中国标准出版社, 2015.
templates.online_resource: [序号] 作者. 题名[EB/OL]. (发表日期)[Accessed日期]. 获取和访问路径.
templates.online_resource_example: [7] 陈林. 数据挖掘技术在医疗领域的应用[EB/OL]. (2020-05-20)[2021-03-15]. https://example.com/article/123.

apa.name: APA
apa.description: 美国心理学会参考文献格式

templates.journal_article: Author, A. A., & Author, B. B. (Year). Title of article. Title of Periodical, volume(issue), pages.
templates.journal_article_example: Zhang, S., Li, S., & Wang, W. (2020). Resource allocation based on optimization methods. Journal of Systems Engineering, 35(3), 321-335.
templates.book: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of work. Publisher.
templates.book_example: Li, M. (2019). Mathematical modeling methods and applications (2nd ed.). Higher Education Press.
templates.conference: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of paper. In Name of Conference (Ed.), Title of compiled proceedings (pp. pages). Publisher.
templates.conference_example: Zhang, H. (2020). Application of intelligent optimization algorithms in path planning. In Systems Engineering Society of China (Ed.), Proceedings of the Systems Engineering Annual Conference (pp. 123-130). Science Press.
templates.thesis: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of dissertation [Doctoral dissertation/Master's thesis, Institution]. Repository.
templates.thesis_example: Wang, Q. (2021). Application of machine learning in time series prediction [Doctoral dissertation, Tsinghua University].

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.name_en: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers

templates.journal_article: [1] A. A. Author, "Title of paper," Title of Journal, vol. X, no. X, pp. X-X, Month Year.
templates.journal_article_example: [1] S. Zhang, S. Li, and W. Wang, "Resource allocation based on optimization methods," J. Syst. Eng., vol. 35, no. 3, pp. 321-335, 2020.
templates.book: [1] A. A. Author, Title of Book. Publisher, Year.
templates.book_example: [1] M. Li, Mathematical Modeling Methods and Applications, 2nd ed. Higher Education Press, 2019.
templates.conference: [1] A. A. Author, "Title of paper," in Name of Conference, Location, Year, pp. X-X.
templates.conference_example: [1] H. Zhang, "Application of intelligent optimization algorithms in path planning," in Proc. Syst. Eng. Annu. Conf., Shanghai, China, 2020, pp. 123-130.

templates.journal_article: AuthorLast, First. "Article Title." Journal Title, vol. #, no. #, Year, pp. #-#.
templates.journal_article_example: Zhang, Sinan, et al. "Resource Allocation Based on Optimization Methods." Journal of Systems Engineering, vol. 35, no. 3, 2020, pp. 321-335.
templates.book: AuthorLast, First. Book Title. Publisher, Year.
templates.book_example: Li, Ming. Mathematical Modeling Methods and Applications. Higher Education Press, 2019.

author_format.three_plus_authors: 作者1, 作者2, 作者3（等）或 作者1, 等.

gbt7714.numeric: 采用顺序编码制，用[1]、[2]等表示

apa.author_year: 采用作者-年份制，(Author, Year)或Author(Year)
apa.example: (Zhang, 2020) 或 Zhang (2020) 提出了...方法

ieee.numeric: 采用顺序编码制，用[1]、[2]等表示
